1. Aggregate(count() by host [partial])  [spill-capable]
  2. Filter(has(_raw, "timeout"))
    3. Scan(nginx, [(-1h)])
      raw_term: "timeout" via FST
      columns: [_raw, _source, _time, host]

Annotations:
  Desugar rewrites:
    search-sugar: timeout => where has(_raw, "timeout")
  Optimizer rules:
    predicate-pushdown (1x)
    partial-agg (1x)
    column-pruning (1x)
